zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna de Ledes於1372年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯時，她的父親Roger de Leeds26歲，母親Jane de Tilli23歲。她於1398年與Geoffrey Pigot在英國越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年在英國英格蘭艾可霍可維爾享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可霍可維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna de Ledes于1372年出生在英国英格兰越可爾利德斯时，她的父亲Roger de Leeds26岁，母亲Jane de Tilli23岁。她于1398年与Geoffrey Pigot在英国越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1466年在英国英格兰艾可霍可維爾享年94岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可霍可維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ledes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Ledée and Lédée): variant of Ledé (see Ledet ). This surname is also found in the West Indies, including Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Ledet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Emile, Leonce, Angelle, Antoine, Aurelie, Camille, Etienne, Ferrel, Gillis, Gisele.

French: variant of Ledé, from le dé, meaning either ‘the thimble’ or ‘the die’, hence used as a metonymic occupational name for a stitcher or tailor, or as a nickname for a gambler. Compare Leday 1 and Ledee 2.

History: Antoine Livaudais Ledet from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married first Marguerite Willig in Edgard, LA, in 1788, and second Victoire-Françoise Quimine in Plattenville, LA, in 1797.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna de Ledes was born in 1372, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Leeds, was 26 and her mother, Jane de Tilli, was 23. She married Geoffrey Pigot in 1398, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1466, in Hawkwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Hawkwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna de Ledes est née en 1372, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Leeds, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane de Tilli, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Pigot en 1398, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Hawkwell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Hawkwell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna de Ledes 1372 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Leeds 26 und ihre Mutter Jane de Tilli 23. Sie hat 1398 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Geoffrey Pigot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Hawkwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hawkwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Ledes è nata il nel 1372 nel Leeds, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger de Leeds, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jane de Tilli, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey Pigot nel 1398, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1466, nel Hawkwell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a Hawkwell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna de Ledesが1372年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで生まれた時，父Roger de Leedsは26歳，母Jane de Tilliは23歳であった。1398年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでGeoffrey Pigotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1466年にイギリスイギリスエセックスハウクウエルで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスハウクウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna de Ledes(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Leeds(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane de Tilli(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1398년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Geoffrey Pigot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 호k웰에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 호k웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Ledes nasceu em 1372, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Leeds, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Tilli, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Pigot em 1398, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1466, em Hawkwell, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Hawkwell, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna de Ledes родилась в 1372 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Leeds было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Tilli, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Pigot в 1398 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности ховквелл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности ховквелл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna de Ledes nació en 1372, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Leeds, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane de Tilli, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Geoffrey Pigot en 1398, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1466, en Hawkwell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Hawkwell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
